## reference · serial position effect

* Users best remember the first and last items in a series.
* Place least important items in the middle of lists to reduce memorization.
* Position key actions on the far left and right within elements like navigation to increase memorization.
* The serial position effect is influenced by two concepts: primacy effect (better recall of first items) and recency effect (better recall of last items).

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/serial-position-effect/
